title: stemodia tetragona
intro: Stemodia tetragona, also known as "False Dragonhead," is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Stemodia tetragona include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
